allow: Bash(node -e "const Store = require\(''electron-store''\); const s = new Store\(\); console.log\(Object.keys\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(s\)\).join\('', ''\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\(''electron-store''\).then\(m => { const Store = m.default; const s = new Store\(\); console.log\(typeof s.get, typeof s.set\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "import\(''electron-store''\).then\(m => { const Store = m.default; const s = new Store\({ name: ''test'' }\); console.log\(typeof s.get, typeof s.set, typeof s.store\); }\)")
